expectations.text: Mentions sawtooth, square, triangle, or sine waveforms
expectations.evidence: sawtooth (or saw) — bright, buzzy; the classic synth bass choice ... square — hollow, reedy ... triangle — soft, mellow ... sine — pure, smooth tone
note("c2").s("sawtooth")  // sawtooth wave at C2 ... note("c2 eb2 g2").s("square")
.lpf(freq) — low-pass filter; rolls off high frequencies for warmth ... .lpf(sine.range(200, 1200).slow(8))

expectations.text: Contains a complete runnable synth bass code snippet
